replika.title: Replika | The AI Friend to do Life With
replika.description: Meet Replika, the AI companion to do life with. Chat, reflect, grow, and build a meaningful connection with your AI friend.

tamagotchi_uni.title: Tamagotchi Uni | Official Tamagotchi Site
tamagotchi_uni.description: The official site for Tamagotchi Uni with totally unique Tamagotchi characters you can raise to play with other personalized friends from around the world. Read the latest news, and learn all there is to know about the fun ways to play!

desktop_goose.text_snippet: Desktop Goose by samperson View all by samperson samperson Follow samperson Follow Following samperson Following Add To Collection Collection Comments Devlog Submission to Bundle Submission for Indie Bundle for Abortion Funds Related games Related Desktop Goose A downloadable goose-sperience for Windows and macOS Download Now Name your own price HONK HONK, HEAR YE. I have created a goose for your desktop. He'll nab your mouse, track mud on your screen...  leave you a message, deliver you memes? Play video games with a desktop buddy who will attack you if you poke him. Fill out spreadsheets while your screen fills up with instances of Goose Notepad. Supports MacOS versions 10.10+! NOTE: I am not affiliated with House House or Panic. This is a different goose. Direct support questions to the Discord! --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- [And if you wanna support my work, I made some new things you can check out !] Fidget
